author: Youcef Mammar
subject: feat(insights): add insightsClient support on storybook (algolia/vue-instantsearch#664)
body:
* feat(insights): add insightsClient support on storybook

**Summary**

this prepares for the insights stories to be added illustrating the
usage of Hits and InfiniteHits widgets with insights.

* remove default insights definition for all stories

* fix: change default insightsClient value to undefined

Co-Authored-By: tkrugg <tkrugg@users.noreply.github.com>

* add check
